corrupted_ciphertext.description: Bit-flip in MLS ciphertext; decrypt must fail cleanly without panic

truncated_ciphertext.description: Ciphertext truncated to 16 bytes; decrypt must fail cleanly

empty_ciphertext.description: Empty ciphertext string; schema validation must reject

oversized_ciphertext.description: Ciphertext exceeding reasonable bounds; should be rejected before MLS

wrong_epoch_ciphertext.description: Ciphertext from epoch N sent with epoch N+1 header; epoch binding must reject

replayed_event_id.description: Same event_id submitted twice; replay filter must reject

sequence_rollback.description: Event with sequence < last seen for same node; must be rejected

format_downgrade_gate.description: Gate message with format=legacy_cleartext; must be rejected by schema

format_downgrade_dm.description: DM with format=dm1 when MLS lock is active; must be hard-failed

tier_spoof_private_to_public.description: Envelope claiming private_strong when supervisor reports public_degraded; must be clamped

tier_spoof_private_transitional_to_stron.description: Envelope claiming private_strong when only transitional is available; must be clamped

forbidden_field_injection_ip.description: Public ledger event with ip_address field; must be rejected

forbidden_field_injection_transport.description: Public ledger event with transport_lock field; must be rejected

forbidden_field_injection_secret.description: Public ledger event with session_key field; must be rejected by validate_public_ledger_payload

invalid_signature_on_event.description: Valid event with corrupted signature; must fail strict signature verification

node_id_binding_mismatch.description: Event where node_id does not match SHA-256(public_key); must be rejected

revoked_key_event.description: Event signed by a revoked key; must be rejected for all types except key_revoke
